title: Record Heat Wave Expected This Week
summary: Spring weather is starting with a record heat wave expected late this week, with temperatures in the 70s and 80s dominating the 10-day forecast.
charlotte_impact: Unusually warm weather can impact agriculture, energy consumption, and public health, requiring adjustments in daily routines.

title: North Carolina Gas Prices Spike Amid Middle East Conflict
summary: Gas prices in North Carolina surge to $2.99 a gallon, nearly 25 cents higher than last week, due to the Iran conflict and ongoing Middle East strikes.
charlotte_impact: Rising gas prices affect transportation costs for consumers and businesses, potentially impacting the local economy.

title: Democrat Carla Cunningham Loses NC House Primary
summary: Carla Cunningham, a Democratic incumbent in Mecklenburg County, suffers a primary loss, marking a shift in local political representation.
charlotte_impact: Primary losses can signal changing voter preferences and potential shifts in the political landscape of the region.

title: Garry McFadden Wins Re-Election Bid
summary: Garry McFadden secures re-election after a primary race highlighted on "704 Unfiltered," featuring discussions with his challengers.
charlotte_impact: Re-election indicates voter confidence in McFadden's leadership and policies within the local community.

title: Cooper, Whatley Secure Nominations in NC US Senate Race
summary: Roy Cooper and Michael Whatley secure nominations for the US Senate race in North Carolina, setting the stage for a major national run.
charlotte_impact: Nominations determine the candidates who will compete for a significant national position, influencing state and national politics.

title: Rep. Alma Adams Wins Democratic Primary
summary: Rep. Alma Adams wins the Democratic primary, continuing her tenure in the seat she has held since 2014, while Codiga wins Republican primary.
charlotte_impact: Adams' victory reflects continued support from her constituents and her established presence in Congress.

title: Key Races in NC District 11: 2026 Primary Update
summary: North Carolina's primary races in District 11 are heating up, with diverse candidates competing for various positions.
charlotte_impact: Competitive districts can lead to significant policy changes and shifts in political representation.

title: Man Charged After Stabbing K-9, Shot by Police
summary: Robert Lester, 35, faces charges after stabbing a K-9 and being shot by Hickory police officers during the incident.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by law enforcement animals and the potential for violent confrontations.

title: Chemical Spill at Silfab Solar Plant Investigated
summary: A potassium hydroxide spill at the Silfab Solar plant in Fort Mill is under investigation by environmental services.
charlotte_impact: Chemical spills raise concerns about environmental safety and the potential health impacts on the local community.

title: NC Prepares for Severe Weather Season
summary: North Carolina marks Severe Weather Preparedness Week as Daylight Saving Time begins, emphasizing storm awareness and safety routines.
charlotte_impact: Preparation for severe weather is crucial for minimizing damage and ensuring public safety during storm season.

title: Charlotte Leaders Outline 'Big Moves 2030' Transportation Projects
summary: Charlotte officials detail the rapid deployment of "Big Moves 2030" transportation projects at the annual City Council retreat.
charlotte_impact: Transportation projects can improve connectivity, reduce congestion, and stimulate economic growth in the city.

title: NC Voters Weigh Key Issues in Primary Election
summary: Voters across North Carolina prioritize public safety and affordable housing in Tuesday's primary, setting the stage for November.
charlotte_impact: Voter priorities influence policy decisions and the direction of governance at the state and local levels.

title: NC Primary Election Results Delayed
summary: North Carolina primary election results are delayed due to issues in one Halifax County precinct, with results expected around 8:30 p.m.
charlotte_impact: Delays in election results can raise concerns about the integrity and efficiency of the voting process.

title: North Carolina's Primary Evolution
summary: North Carolina has a semi-closed primary system where registered voters must choose a party ballot, but unaffiliated voters can pick.
charlotte_impact: Understanding the primary system is essential for voter participation and influencing election outcomes.

title: Suspects Wanted for Tobacco Shop Break-in
summary: Security footage shows two suspects breaking into a tobacco shop in Kings Mountain, prompting a police investigation.
charlotte_impact: Local crime incidents affect community safety and can lead to increased security measures.
